productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Red Stay Gold Tee Top
description: Style Note Being fashionable means being able to combine the right amount of comfort with a bucket load of style in your outfit. Wranger goes colourful and super trendy with this tank top. Pair it with your favourite pair of jeans or a pair of comfortable shorts and accessorise subtly. Product Details A bright red top with short sleeves, round neck, loop at the nape, flaring pin tucks below the loop, stitching at the hemline and a white print in front Material and Care 100% cotton Hand wash cold using a mild detergent with like colours Do not bleach Do not iron on print or embellishments Do not wring Do not tumble dry and flat dry in shade Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
